data.title: European companies on Workday platform optimizing deployments for better outcomes, ISG says.
data.description: In London, it has been reported that European companies embracing the cloud-based Workday platform are focusing on enhancing their deployments for improved business results, according to ISG. This move signifies a growing trend among businesses in the region to leverage advanced technology solutions.

data.title: OptiGroup's climate targets approved as aligning with SBTi; key milestone in sustainability journey.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on October 17, 2025, it was announced that OptiGroup has achieved a major achievement in its sustainability efforts. The company's climate goals have been officially recognized and endorsed by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi). This confirmation indicates that OptiGroup's objectives in this area are in line with established standards.

data.title: State Street Corp likely to report higher Q3 earnings, with analysts predicting $2.65/share, up from $2.26/share year ago.
data.description: State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday, October 17. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.65 per share, a notable increase from $2.26 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $3.47 billion, up from $3.26 billion year-over-year. Recently, Brian Porter was appointed to State Street's board of directors on September 17. The company's stock experienced a 3.2% decline, closing at $112.95 on Thursday. For comprehensive details, individuals can find the full story on Benzinga.com where they can also access the latest analyst ratings regarding State Street and other stocks. The information on the Analyst Stock Ratings page can be arranged by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and more.

data.title: 3rd Shanghai-London Screen Industry Forum at BAFTA strengthens Sino-British ties in global storytelling.
data.description: In London on October 17, 2025, the 3rd Shanghai-London Screen Industry Forum was held at BAFTA, marking another successful gathering after two previous editions. The event united influential figures and up-and-coming talents from the Chinese and UK screen industries, highlighting its significance as a platform for collaboration and innovation.

data.title: Stellantis and Pony.ai collaborate on SAE Level 4 autonomous vehicles for robotaxi; initial focus on medium size vans.
data.description: Stellantis and Pony.ai have announced a partnership to collaborate on developing and testing SAE Level 4 autonomous vehicles. This collaboration will involve integrating Stellantis' AV-Ready Platform with Pony.ai's advanced autonomous driving technology. The initial emphasis will be on battery-electric medium-sized vans, a targeted choice for robotaxi services. The partnership aims to advance the capabilities of autonomous vehicles and propel innovation in the industry.

data.title: Florida Climate Week™ 2025, led by VoLo Foundation, saw 80 events, 1,800 participants, and 18 proclamations, promoting climate action.
data.description: The recent Florida Climate Week, organized by VoLo Foundation in Palm Beach, witnessed participation from 1,800 individuals in over 80 free events. The event also saw the issuance of 18 local proclamations aimed at fostering collaboration, education, and solutions. This year's event marked the fifth edition of FCW and took place on October 17, 2025, showcasing the commitment of various stakeholders towards addressing climate issues.

data.title: Fifth Third Bancorp to release Q3 earnings, expected at 86 cents/share, up from 78 cents last year. Revenue estimate at $2.29 billion. Merging with Comerica in $10.9 billion deal. Shares fell by 6% to close at $40.36.
data.description: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Friday, October 17. Analysts are predicting earnings of 86 cents per share, reflecting an increase from 78 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus revenue estimate for this quarter is $2.29 billion, up from $2.14 billion year-over-year. The company recently approved a merger with Comerica Incorporated (CMA) in an all-stock transaction valued at $10.9 billion. Following this news, Fifth Third Bancorp's stock price dropped by 6% to close at $40.36 on Thursday. For more details, readers can visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ally Financial (NYSE: ALLY) Q3 earnings expected at $1.01 per share, revenue $2.11 billion, shares fell 3.2%.
data.description: Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE: ALLY) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Friday, Oct. 17, before the market opens. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.01 per share, an increase from 95 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $2.11 billion, slightly higher than the $2.1 billion recorded a year ago. Ally Financial recently filed for a mixed shelf offering on Oct. 1. The company's stock saw a 3.2% drop, closing at $38.45 on Thursday. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where they can sort information by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other factors.

data.description: This week in Beijing, the chief executive of the company made commitments mirroring those declared at the White House. Additionally, he received a personalized Labubu.
